parameters.content:
## Sosyal Medya — Üret → Onay → Yayın

**Üret:** Pazartesi 09:00 cron veya `POST /webhook/nefalix/social/generate`
→ `execution/social-generate-next.py` (şablon seç, PNG render, WA onay)

**Onay:** `POST /webhook/nefalix/social/approve`
`{"token":"...","action":"approve|reject|schedule","scheduled_at":"ISO"}`

**Yayın:** Saatlik cron veya `POST /webhook/nefalix/social/publish`
→ `execution/social-publish-approved.py`

Env: `META_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN`, `INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID`, `LINKEDIN_*`, `SOCIAL_PUBLIC_BASE_URL`
